---
title: "Mi informe"
author: "Ane"
format: typst
---

# Mi informe del dataset Nigro et al.

```{r}
#| echo: FALSE
#| message: FALSE
#| warning: FALSE
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
```

```{r}
#| message: FALSE
#| warning: FALSE
dt<-read_csv(here("data/data_clean.csv"))
```

La media de frutos general es `r mean(dt$count, na.rm=TRUE)`.
```{r}
#| fig-cap: "Figura 1: plot"
ggplot(dt, aes(y=count, x=year, colour = site ))+
  geom_point()
```
